changeSet.author: FelixTJDietrich
changeSet.comment: Drop orphan Hibernate-synthesized UNIQUE constraints on discussion / discussion_category that accumulated under ddl-auto:update alongside the Liquibase-managed uq_discussion_repo_number / uq_discussion_category_repo_slug. Idempotent (IF EXISTS); no-op on production (which always ran ddl-auto:none).
